completed_tasks.title: Create Memory Architecture Documentation

completed_tasks.title: Implement Local Brain SQLite Database

completed_tasks.notes: Dependencies installed (sqlite3, uuid). Tested with comprehensive test script.

completed_tasks.title: Update AGENTS.md for Agent Workflow Superseding
completed_tasks.description: Modify AGENTS.md to clarify that agent-specific coding workflows supersede default MCP orchestration while maintaining shared learning layer access

completed_tasks.title: Integrate Local Brain into Kilo Code Extension API
completed_tasks.description: Modify src/extension/api.ts and src/extension.ts to instantiate and pass LocalBrain instance

remaining_tasks.title: Implement LocalBrain Usage Methods in API Class

Add lesson management methods (saveTemporaryLesson, getTemporaryLessons, promoteLessonToCentralBrain)

remaining_tasks.title: Implement Synchronization Logic
remaining_tasks.description: Add automatic synchronization between Local Brain and Central Brain based on rules
subtasks: Session end handling: generate summary, save to LocalBrain, evaluate for promotion
Lesson promotion: check confidence threshold and content type, auto-promote to Central Brain
Central Brain sync: check LocalBrain cache first, query Central Brain if missing, cache responses

remaining_tasks.title: Update MCP Bridge Configuration
remaining_tasks.description: Add Local Brain MCP server to .mcp.json for direct access

remaining_tasks.title: Testing and Validation

subtasks: Verify data persists between VS Code restarts

remaining_tasks.title: Documentation Updates

current_status: Foundation complete. Local Brain database created and integrated into extension API. Remaining work is to implement actual usage methods and synchronization logic.
